title: Single molecular force across single integrins dictates cell spreading.
author: Chowdhury F Li ITS Leslie BJ Doganay S Singh R Wang X Seong J Lee SH Park S Wang N Ha T
content: S-EPMC4593737 PMC4593737 Single molecular force across single integrins dictates cell spreading. Cells' ability to sense and interpret mechanical signals from the extracellular milieu modulates the degree of cell spreading. Yet how cells detect such signals and activate downstream signaling
